commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens Package Acceptance URL downloads and adds a `source=trusted-url` policy path, workflow inputs, docs, and focused tooling tests.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. The PR diff shows a top-level `undici` import in a workflow path with `install-deps: "false"`, and Node URL normalization turns `[::ffff:127.0.0.1]` into `[::ffff:7f00:1]`, which the new dotted-IPv4 regex misses.
commands.review_followup: The blocking defects are concrete enough for an automated repair attempt, but maintainers still need to accept the stricter URL policy before merge.

target.title: fix: harden package URL downloads
target.author: jason-allen-oneal

commands.reason: author association CONTRIBUTOR and repository permission none are not allowed
